name: octacard
description: OctaCard - Audio file management and conversion tool

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n vite,api "pnpm run dev:vite" "pnpm run dev:api"
scripts.release-screenshots: concurrently -k -s first -n preview,capture "pnpm:preview:it" "wait-on http://127.0.0.1:3010 && E2E_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3010 node scripts/capture-release-screenshots.mjs"
scripts.test:e2e:coverage: pnpm run build:coverage && concurrently -k -s first -n preview,e2e "pnpm:preview:it" "wait-on http://127.0.0.1:3010 && E2E_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3010 pnpm exec playwright test --config=playwright.config.ts"
scripts.test:coverage:full: pnpm run test:coverage && pnpm run test:e2e:coverage && node scripts/merge-coverage.mjs
scripts.dev:it: concurrently -k -s first -n dev,it "pnpm run dev" "wait-on http://localhost:3000 && E2E_BASE_URL=http://localhost:3000 pnpm run it"
scripts.test:it: pnpm run build && concurrently -k -s first -n preview,it "pnpm:preview:it" "wait-on http://127.0.0.1:3010 && E2E_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3010 pnpm run it"
scripts.test:it:release-notes: pnpm run build && concurrently -k -s first -n preview,it "pnpm:preview:it" "wait-on http://127.0.0.1:3010 && E2E_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3010 pnpm run it:release-notes"
scripts.clean:all: pnpm run clean && rm -rf node_modules/.cache node_modules/.vite
scripts.terraform:destroy:staging: cd terraform && terraform workspace select staging && terraform destroy -var-file=environments/staging/terraform.tfvars
scripts.terraform:destroy:production: cd terraform && terraform workspace select production && terraform destroy -var-file=environments/production/terraform.tfvars
scripts.terraform:state:rm-secrets:staging: cd terraform && terraform workspace select staging && terraform state rm aws_secretsmanager_secret_version.database_url aws_secretsmanager_secret_version.redis_url aws_secretsmanager_secret_version.better_auth_secret aws_secretsmanager_secret.database_url aws_secretsmanager_secret.redis_url aws_secretsmanager_secret.better_auth_secret
scripts.terraform:state:rm-secrets:production: cd terraform && terraform workspace select production && terraform state rm aws_secretsmanager_secret_version.database_url aws_secretsmanager_secret_version.redis_url aws_secretsmanager_secret_version.better_auth_secret aws_secretsmanager_secret.database_url aws_secretsmanager_secret.redis_url aws_secretsmanager_secret.better_auth_secret
scripts.terraform:state:rm-rds:production: cd terraform && terraform workspace select production && terraform state rm aws_db_instance.postgres
scripts.terraform:workspace:staging: cd terraform && terraform workspace select staging 2>/dev/null || terraform workspace new staging
scripts.terraform:workspace:production: cd terraform && terraform workspace select production 2>/dev/null || terraform workspace new production
scripts.terraform:plan:staging: cd terraform && terraform workspace select staging && terraform plan -var-file=environments/staging/terraform.tfvars
scripts.terraform:plan:production: cd terraform && terraform workspace select production && terraform plan -var-file=environments/production/terraform.tfvars
scripts.terraform:apply:staging: cd terraform && terraform workspace select staging && terraform apply -var-file=environments/staging/terraform.tfvars
scripts.terraform:apply:production: cd terraform && terraform workspace select production && terraform apply -var-file=environments/production/terraform.tfvars
scripts.aws:restart:staging: aws ecs update-service --cluster octacard-staging-cluster --service octacard-staging-service --force-new-deployment --region eu-central-1
scripts.aws:restart:production: aws ecs update-service --cluster octacard-production-cluster --service octacard-production-service --force-new-deployment --region eu-central-1
